overview: Master Deepak Hair Expert — a professional salon website with online booking, multi-service selection, Stripe-hosted payment, and an admin dashboard for managing appointments and payment status.
features: Multi-service checkbox booking form with instant total calculation
Stripe-hosted checkout — customers pay securely before booking is confirmed
Booking created only after payment confirmed — time slots stay open until payment succeeds
Customer confirmation screen with unique booking reference code
Admin dashboard with Today, Past, and Future Bookings tabs showing payment status
Manual payment override toggle for admin corrections
Double-booking prevention enforced at payment confirmation
